Our Services

01 / 07 Our Capabilities

Home Electrical Solutions

Where safety meets comfort.

Complete residential electrical systems engineered for modern living. From precision wiring to intelligent lighting — every circuit designed to last decades.

  • Full-home wiring & rewiring
  • Distribution board installation
  • Earth leakage protection
  • LED lighting systems
Request Quote
02 / 07 Our Capabilities

Industrial Power Systems

Engineered for uptime.

High-capacity power distribution for manufacturing, warehousing, and heavy industry. Built to Kerala Electricity Board standards with zero compromise on safety.

  • Heavy-duty power distribution
  • Machine wiring & commissioning
  • MCC & PCC panels
  • Annual maintenance contracts
Request Quote
03 / 07 Our Capabilities

ATS & AMF Panel Setup

Power that never stops.

Automatic Transfer Switch and Mains Failure panels ensuring instantaneous switchover. Your operations stay protected — even when the grid doesn't.

  • Automatic Transfer Switches
  • AMF panel commissioning
  • Generator synchronization
  • Remote monitoring integration
Request Quote
04 / 07 Our Capabilities

Automation & Smart Control

Intelligence, built in.

From smart lighting to PLC-based industrial automation — intelligent systems that reduce energy consumption while maximizing control and comfort.

  • Smart home systems
  • Industrial PLC automation
  • IoT sensor integration
  • Energy monitoring dashboards
Request Quote
05 / 07 Our Capabilities

Structured Cabling & Networks

Infrastructure that scales.

Enterprise-grade structured cabling following TIA/EIA standards. Server room builds, campus networks, and fiber optic deployments — built for tomorrow's bandwidth.

  • Cat6/Cat6A cabling
  • Fiber optic installation
  • Server room builds
  • Testing & Fluke certification
Request Quote
06 / 07 Our Capabilities

Surveillance & Security Systems

Total visibility. Total control.

Comprehensive security ecosystems combining HD/4K CCTV, biometric access, and integrated alarms — with 24/7 remote monitoring from your smartphone.

  • HD/4K IP camera systems
  • NVR/DVR recording
  • Biometric access control
  • Smart alarm integration
Request Quote
07 / 07 Our Capabilities

Repair & Maintenance

We never rest.

Emergency response. Fault diagnosis. Preventive maintenance. Our rapid-response team is available around the clock — because electrical problems never wait.

  • 24/7 emergency response
  • Fault detection & diagnosis
  • Preventive maintenance
  • Safety audits & compliance
Request Quote

Performance Metrics

Precision Engineering,
Quantified.

Our legacy is built on measurable standards. From voltage regulation to emergency response times, we track every parameter to guarantee absolute safety and performance.

REF.01 / VOLTS

Projects Successfully Commissioned

REF.02 / DURATION

0+

Years of Certified Engineering Excellence

REF.04 / AUDIT

How We Work

A Disciplined
Engineering Process

Every project follows a structured methodology — ensuring precision, transparency, and lasting results.

01

Consultation

We begin with a thorough site assessment, understanding your requirements, load calculations, and safety considerations before any work starts.

02

Design & Planning

Our engineers create detailed electrical layouts, select premium materials, and prepare transparent cost estimates for your approval.

03

Execution

Licensed electricians carry out the installation following Kerala Electricity Board standards. Every connection is tested and verified.

04

Quality Assurance

Comprehensive testing of all circuits, earthing, and safety systems. We don't sign off until every parameter meets our engineering standards.

05

Support & Maintenance

Post-project support with Annual Maintenance Contracts available. Our team remains a single call away for any future requirements.

Why Choose Us

Built on Trust.
Driven by Excellence.

Over a decade serving Kerala with reliability, safety, and workmanship that speaks for itself.

Licensed & Certified

Every electrician holds valid KEB certifications and undergoes continuous safety training.

24/7 Emergency Response

Rapid-response team available around the clock. Electrical emergencies never wait — neither do we.

Premium Materials

Only ISI-marked, brand-certified components. Every installation is engineered to last decades.

Experienced Team

Over 12 years of collective experience across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.

Transparent Pricing

Detailed quotations before work begins. Competitive rates with zero hidden charges.

Pan-Kerala Coverage

Based in Nilambur, serving clients across all of Kerala — Malappuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kochi, and beyond.

Our Story Get Free Estimate

Client Testimonials

Trusted by
industry leaders.

Our clients range from homeowners to factory managers, architects to hotel chains — all united by one outcome: reliable, premium electrical work.

01 / 05
"

Bright Electrical did an outstanding job wiring our entire factory floor. The team was professional, safety-conscious, and completed the project ahead of schedule.

RK
Rajesh Kumar Factory Owner · Nilambur
"

Called them for an emergency at midnight — they arrived within the hour. Fixed a dangerous short circuit quickly and professionally. Their 24/7 service is genuine.

PN
Priya Nair Homeowner · Malappuram
"

We needed complete CCTV installation across our 80-room hotel. Bright Electrical handled everything seamlessly — from design to installation to training our staff.

MR
Mohammed Rashid Hotel Manager · Kozhikode
"

They rewired our entire school building during summer vacation — on time, within budget, and with zero disruption. The quality of work and materials is clearly superior.

SV
Sreelakshmi V. School Principal · Thrissur
"

I've worked with Bright Electrical on multiple commercial projects. They're my first recommendation to every client. Technical knowledge, clean execution, and excellent communication.

AT
Arun Thomas Architect · Kochi

FAQs

Common
Questions

Can't find the answer you're looking for? We're happy to help — reach out via call or WhatsApp.

Ask a Question Call 83049 10099

We are based in Chungathara, Nilambur (Malappuram) and serve clients across all of Kerala, including Malappuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kochi, Palakkad, and surrounding districts. For large projects, we can travel anywhere in Kerala.

Yes, we provide genuine 24/7 emergency electrical services. Whether it's a short circuit, power failure, or any other urgent electrical issue, our rapid-response team is available to assist you any time of day or night. Call us at +91-8304910099.

Absolutely. All our electricians hold valid certifications from the Kerala Electricity Board and are trained in the latest safety standards. We maintain all required licenses for both domestic and industrial electrical work.

Yes, we provide free site inspections and detailed estimates for all projects. Our engineer will visit your site, assess requirements, and provide a comprehensive quotation within 24 hours — at no charge to you.

We handle everything from domestic home wiring to complex industrial power systems. Our services include: home wiring & rewiring, industrial panel installations, ATS/AMF panels, smart automation, CCTV & security systems, structured cabling, and ongoing maintenance contracts.

Yes, we offer comprehensive AMC packages for residential, commercial, and industrial clients. Our AMC includes scheduled inspections, preventive maintenance, priority response for breakdowns, and detailed service reports. Contact us to discuss a plan tailored to your needs.

We accept all major payment methods including cash, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), NEFT/RTGS bank transfers, and cheques. We provide proper GST invoices for all services.

A standard home wiring project for a 2-3 bedroom house typically takes 3–7 working days, depending on size and complexity. We provide a detailed timeline in our quotation before work begins, and we commit to completing on schedule.

Free Estimates · No Obligation
